page.title: Gabriel Olivieri - Full Stack Developer
page.description: Personal portfolio of Gabriel Olivieri. Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience building innovative digital solutions. Explore my work experience, education, tech stack, certifications, and featured projects.

hero.descriptionHtml:
I am a Full stack Developer, focused on building digital solutions that combine technical innovation, adaptability, and an obsessive commitment to user value.
I lead by example, enjoy empowering teams, and dive deep into complex challenges where the solution is not written yet.
If you have an ambitious project, let's talk.

items.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
items.description: Software development for large-scale financial management solutions.

items.title: Team Leader / DevOps
items.description: Project and team leadership, estimations, and delivery planning. DevOps implementation with infrastructure as code, virtualization, monitoring, and orchestration. Software development focused on scalability, security, and performance.

items.title: Engineering Student
items.description: Information Systems Engineering degree focused on analysis, design, and implementation of business-oriented multi-platform solutions.

items.title: Computer Science High School Diploma
items.description: Technical education in programming, networking, and systems, with hands-on experience in development tools, office software, and school project management.
